urdu transliteration text: HAAL E GHAM SUNAENGE JAB IMAM AAYENGE
english translation text: When the Imam comes, we will tell him our sorrows

urdu transliteration text: ZAKHM DIL DIKHAENGE JAB IMAM AAYENGE
english translation text: When The Imam Comes, We Will Open Up Our Hearts.

urdu transliteration text: MEHFIL E JAMAAENGE JAB IMAM AYENGE
english translation text: When The Imam Comes, We Will Celebrate

urdu transliteration text: BABODAR SAJAENGE JAB IMAM AAYENGE
english translation text: When The Imam Comes, We Will Decorate Our Homes

urdu transliteration text: JASHNE HUM MANAYENGE, JAB IMAM AYENGE
english translation text: When the Imam comes, we will celebrate

urdu transliteration text: ZAKHM HAI ABHI TAAZA MAKKAH AUR MADEENA KE
english translation text: The Wounds Of Makkah And Madeena Are Still Fresh

urdu transliteration text:
SHAM O KUFA KARBOBALA HUM BHULA NAHI SAKTE
We cannot forgot Shaam, kufa and Karbala
AZ SAKHEEFA TAAI DAM GHAIR SE NAHI POHCHE
english translation text: From Saqeefa till today, we have been hurt by our own

urdu transliteration text: JITNE DUKH UTHAE HAI HUMNE KALMA GOYO SE
english translation text: The muslims have wounded us

urdu transliteration text: EK EK CHUKAENGE..
english translation text: They will pay for each one

urdu transliteration text: JAB IMAM AAYENGE
english translation text: When the Imam comes

urdu transliteration text: SHAK HAI JINKO ALLAH KE ADL AUR ADAALAT PAR
english translation text: Those who have doubts on the justice of Allah

urdu transliteration text: MANSAB E NUBUWAT PAR SAIYADA KI ISMAT PAR
english translation text: On the status of Prophethood and on the infallibility of Sayyeda

urdu transliteration text: MURTAZA KI AHMED SE MUTASSIL NIYABAT PAR
english translation text: On the direct succession of Imam Ali after the Prophet

urdu transliteration text: JINKO SHAQ HAI BARA PAR BAARWEY KI GHAIBAT PER
english translation text: Those who doubt about the Imams and the ghaibat of the 12th Imam

urdu transliteration text: SAB HI MAAR KHAENGE
english translation text: They will all be punished

urdu transliteration text: JAB IMAM AAYENGE
english translation text: When the Imam come

urdu transliteration text: NAAM PAR SAHABA KE KAAM KAFIRO JAISE
english translation text: They call themselves companions but their actions are like disbelievers

urdu transliteration text: NAAM PAR SAHABA KE KAAM FASIQO JAISE
english translation text: They call themselves companions but their actions are like transgressors

urdu transliteration text: NAAM PAR SAHABA KE KAAM MUNKIRO JAISE
english translation text: They call themselves companions but their actions are like the ones who deny

urdu transliteration text: NAAM PAR SAHABA KE KAAM MUSHRIQO JAISE
english translation text: They call themselves companions but their actions are like polytheists

urdu transliteration text: SAB HI MUH CHURAYENGE
english translation text: They will all hide their faces in embarrasement

urdu transliteration text: SAB HI MAAR KHAENGE
english translation text: They will all be punished

urdu transliteration text: JAB IMAM AAYENGE
english translation text: When the Imam come

urdu transliteration text: DAWA E MOHABBAT JO SUBHO SHAAM KARTE HAI
english translation text: Those who proclaim their love for the Imam day and night

urdu transliteration text: UNKO DUSHMAN O SE BHI RAAO RASM RAKHTE HAI
english translation text: Continue to keep good ties with the enemies

urdu transliteration text: KHUMS BHI NAHI DETE GHEEBATE BHI KARTE HAI
english translation text: They do not pay Khums and they backbite

urdu transliteration text: MOMINO SE BHI DIL ME BUGHZ O KEENA RAKHTE HAI
english translation text: Even for the momineen, they have hatred in the hearts

urdu transliteration text: KISTARAH NIBHAENGE
english translation text: How will they fulfill their proclamation?

urdu transliteration text: JAB IMAM AAYENGE
english translation text: When the Imam come

urdu transliteration text: JHUT BOLNE KO HUM MASHGALA SAMJHTE HAI
english translation text: We have made lying our hobby

urdu transliteration text:
BAAT BAAT PER BEJAAN MASLEHAT BARAKHTE HAI
We endorse our opinion about everything
AUR MUNAFIQAT KO BHI MASLEHAT HI KEHTE HAI
english translation text: We think it is alright to be hypocritical

urdu transliteration text: LAHVO LAAB KA SAAMAA’N HUM GHARO ME RAKHTE HAIN
english translation text: Our houses are full of things of futile entertainment

urdu transliteration text: KISTARAH CHHUPAYENGE?
english translation text: How will we hide it all?

urdu transliteration text: JAB IMAM AAYENGE
english translation text: When the Imam come

urdu transliteration text: NEMATE SHARIYAT KO BOJH HI SAMJHTE HAI
english translation text: The blessings of Shariah is considered a burden

urdu transliteration text: LAHVO LAAB HI KO HUM ZINDAGI SAMAJHTE HAIN
english translation text: We think futile entertainment is the true life

urdu transliteration text: SAHIBAN E ZAR KO BADA AADMI SAMAJHTE HAI
english translation text: We pay more respect to the wealthy people

urdu transliteration text: TANG DAST MOMIN KO BAS YUHI SAMAJHTE HAI
english translation text: We do not pay heed to the less fortunate believers

urdu transliteration text: KYA MAQAAM PAENGE
english translation text: What will be our status?

urdu transliteration text: JAB IMAM AAYENGE
english translation text: When the Imam come

urdu transliteration text: YE HAMARE MAKRO RIYA SHATIRANA AIYARI
english translation text: Due to our cunningness and showing off

urdu transliteration text: KYA HAMARE SAWM O SALAAT AUR YEH AZADARI
english translation text: What about our Sawm, Salat and Azadari

urdu transliteration text: KITNA HAI KHULUS IN ME KIS KADAR RIYAKARI
english translation text: How sincere are our actions?

urdu transliteration text: KYA IMAM KI KHAATIR HUM NE KI HAI TAYYARI?
english translation text: How have we prepared for the Imam?

urdu transliteration text: KAISE MUH DIKHAENGE?
english translation text: How will we face our Imam?

urdu transliteration text: JAB IMAM AAYENGE
english translation text: When the Imam come

urdu transliteration text: AL AJAL JO KEHTE HAIN AGAYE TO KYA HOGA?
english translation text: Those who say Al Ajal, if he comes what will happen?

urdu transliteration text: KYA HAI APNI TAYYARI PESH HUM KARENGE KYA?
english translation text: How prepared are we? What will we present to them?

urdu transliteration text: SIBTE JAFFER APNA TO KUL YAHI HAI SARMAYA
english translation text: Sibte Jaffer this is our capital

urdu transliteration text: Praises, eulogies and salutations
english translation text: HUMD O NAAT O SOZ O SALAAM AUR MUNQABAT NAUHA

urdu transliteration text: HAM YAHI SUNAYENGE
english translation text: Is what we will tell him

urdu transliteration text: JAB IMAM AAYENGE
english translation text: When the Imam come
